title: Immediate Early Gene (IEG) mapping of spinal cord neurons activated by cystometry-induced micturition in rats [keast-002]
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ahjjc","text":"This collection describes the procedures required to visualize and characterize lumbosacral spinal neurons that are activated by cystometry of awake adult male and female Sprague-Dawley rats. This collection includes protocols for:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"djijc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fba36","text":"STAGE 1: Surgery to cannulate the bladder, followed by recovery then cystometry","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dsqik","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8k14r","text":"STAGE 2: Intracardiac perfusion with fixative to preserve the spinal cord tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7mk1q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b4h0v","text":"STAGE 3: Immunohistochemical labelling of spinal cord sections to visualise immediate early gene expression in specific spinal regions and neuronal populations","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"357dr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4ut8t","text":"STAGE 4: Microscopy and image analysis to assess patterns of immediate early gene expression in different spinal cord regions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Janet R Keast
